name: Chocolate Zucchini Cake
recipeIngredient: 3 Zucchini, about 6 inches long, shredded (2 cups)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 325°F.
2. Grease a 9x13-inch pan.
3. Combine the sugars, butter, and oil in a bowl.
4. Add the eggs, buttermilk, and vanilla, mixing well.
5. Sift together the flour, cocoa, baking soda, cinnamon, and salt.
6. Gradually add the sifted ingredients to the wet mixture, stirring until combined.
7. Stir in the shredded zucchini.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and sprinkle chocolate chips evenly over the top (if using).
9. Bake for 45 minutes.
10. Allow the cake to cool completely before turning it out onto a wire rack.
This is a really moist cake that may last for awhile.
